title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: NEWBERG HIGH SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 2400 E Douglas Avenue Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (971) 231-5855 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 231-5855 Main phone Main phone (971) 231-5855 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurances and sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEWBERG HIGH SCHOOL SBHC
